narrative:
Lyndhurst municipal court district has 42,975 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +8.1% D−R vs +19.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
